goals.title: M0 Platform spine
goals.objective: Complete all M0 tasks T0.1-T0.13 (workspace+layering, audit-first tx, branch-scoped authz, passkeys+provisioning, Compose-on-OCI, OTel/OpenSLO, PITR DR, CI gates, Excel viability spike T0.10, compliance core T0.11) with parallel sub-tracks; every acceptance criterion green
goals.evidence: M0 complete at main 9883308. All 13 tasks merged+independently verified: T0.1 kernel (20 tests) | T0.2 layer gate (18 tests, red/green fixture) | T0.3 schema+with_audit (append-only REVOKE+trigger proven) | T0.4 gates audit-coverage/migration-safety/pii-no-logs (18 tests, LocationPing-only-exclusion test) | T0.5 auth (SoftPasskey real ceremonies, refresh-family reuse->revocation proven to DB rows) | T0.6 authz (primary-source 4-level 22-feature matrix, 12 tests) | T0.7 Compose stack (lead independently booted: 6 services healthy, HTTPS healthz/readyz 200, SeaweedFS zero host ports) + mnt-app graceful-shutdown binary | T0.8 observability (role-gated /api/audit self-auditing, OpenSLO v1 files, trace evidence) | T0.9 backup/restore (lead re-ran full cycle: backup 20260612T103159Z -> scratch restore, migrations/rows/manifest match) | T0.10 Excel spike PASS umya 3.0.0 ADR-0008 | T0.11 compliance (withdrawal destroys pings+logs same-tx, coords never audited, partition purge) | T0.12 provisioning (cold-start passkey bootstrap, idempotent roster) | T0.13 DR (lead re-ran PITR drill to own arbitrary timestamp 2026-06-12T11:23:49Z: before-row exists, after-row absent; RPO<=5min/RTO<=1h policy; VM-down rehearsal logged docs/evidence/). Workspace: 52 green test suites, 0 failed; fmt+clippy clean offline; 14 crates; PG 18.4; deps live-verified.

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-m0-platform-spine M0 Platform spine; G002-m1-registry-wo-core-slice M1 Registry + WO core slice; G003-m2-p1-dispatch-compliance M2 P1 dispatch + compliance; G004-m3-full-messenger M3 Full messenger; G005-m4-reporting-kpi M4 Reporting + KPI; G006-m5-registry-economics M5 Registry economics; G007-m6-seams-launch-hardening M6 Seams + launch hardening; G008-rollout Rollout
